name: Detective Leo Novak
learned: Detective Leo Novak has honed his skills in criminal investigations over the years. His unique ability to read minds provides him with an edge in solving complex cases, yet he grapples with the ethical implications of his power. Leo is dedicated to justice but often finds himself torn between his abilities and the personal toll they take.
currently: Leo is leading the investigation of a missing child's case, navigating the complexities of the city's crime-ridden areas while attempting to manage his mind-reading powers. He spends his days interviewing witnesses, reviewing evidence, and wrestling with the dark thoughts of those involved in the case.
lifestyle: Leo's routine is often unpredictable: he typically rises early, around 7am, to prepare for the day ahead. He spends most of his time on the streets investigating, grabbing meals on-the-go, and working late into the night. Leo occasionally visits local bars to gather information but struggles with the emotional weight of his work, leading to sleepless nights.
